channel.title: Sports News, Latest Sports News, Sports News Headlines Today | Hindustan Times
channel.description: Sports News - Check out latest sports news and headlines from Football, NFL, College Football, Tennis, Badminton, sports coverage, live cricket score, match results and more at Hindustan Times
channel.copyright: Copyright (C) 2019 HT Media Limited. All Rights Reserved.

image.title: Sports News, Latest Sports News, Sports News Headlines Today | Hindustan Times

item.title: Samba with a seatbelt: Carlo Ancelotti's Brazil have less flair, more survival instinct
item.description: Brazil once won by aura. Under Carlo Ancelotti, the Selecao are learning a harder World Cup truth; beauty needs structure to survive.

item.title: The South American statement: How 2026 World Cup has challenged Europe's narrative
item.description: This World Cup has also challenged the long-held belief that South American football begins and ends with Brazil and Argentina.

item.title: Brazil's great escape, Germany's fall and the Dutch collapse prove FIFA World Cup 2026 has no untouchable giants
item.description: Brazil survived Japan at the death, but Germany and Netherlands exited, proving this World Cup has giants without guarantees and reputations without protection.

item.title: Neymar trolls ‘perfect’ predictor after Brazil survive Japan scare: ‘Try again at the next World Cup’
item.description: Neymar took to social media to jest at economist Joachim Klement's prediction that Japan would upset Brazil.

item.title: Europe’s sway weakens as Germany, Netherlands knocked out on penalties
item.description: Germany were the first to fall, Paraguay winning 4-3 on penalties after a 1-1 draw, before Morocco recovered from brink of elimination to stun Netherlands 3-2

item.title: The unfinished rebuild: Why Germany remain stuck in the shadow of 2014
item.description: It was a golden generation that defined an era, but replacing those players proved far more difficult than Germany had anticipated.

item.title: Morocco stun Netherlands in shootout as Saibari seals famous World Cup win
item.description: Morocco eliminated the Netherlands 3-2 in a penalty shootout after a 1-1 draw, marking the Dutch team's earliest World Cup exit.

item.title: Joshua Kimmich admits Germany 'fully deserved to be eliminated', says they struggled against 'not world-class' teams
item.description: Joshua Kimmich accepted that Germany's Round of 32 exit to Paraguay was deserved after failing to produce the level expected of the four-time champions.

item.title: Brazil endure before finding their World Cup gear
item.description: Against one of the World Cup's best-drilled defensive teams, Brazil won 2-1 by changing the questions they were asking of Japan's defence

item.title: Zlatan Ibrahimovic's brutal verdict on Germany's World Cup collapse after defeat on penalties: ‘Hero or zero’
item.description: Zlatan Ibrahimovic said Germany's exit summed up the unforgiving nature of knockout football, where missed chances often come back to haunt teams.

item.title: Netherlands vs Morocco Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Atlas Lions stun Dutch in thrilling Battle of Monterrey
item.description: Netherlands vs Morocco Highlights: Morocco stun Netherlands 3-2 on penalties after a 1-1 draw in Monterrey, keeping their World Cup dream alive and dumping the Dutch out in a dramatic Round of 32 shootout.

item.title: Carlo Ancelotti's gamble: How a half-time roll of the dice broke Japan's press
item.description: Carlo Ancelotti's gamble succeeded because it addressed the root cause of Brazil's problems rather than merely reacting to the scoreline.

item.title: Paraguay knock out four-time champions Germany on penalties in World Cup shocker to reach round of 16
item.description: Jose Canale hit the decisive penalty to give the underdogs a memorable victory and spark wild celebrations, as they advanced to the next round.

item.title: Where was Lucas Trejo during the Venezuela earthquake? Wife, two children killed after home collapses
item.description: Lucas Trejo was with Club Sport Marítimo de La Guaira, preparing for a Copa Venezuela fixture.

item.title: Who was Hector Bello's wife? Andrea Bello died protecting her baby during Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Andrea Bello, wife of Venezuelan footballer Hector Bello, died while using her body to shield their one-year-old daughter.

item.title: Why is Chris Johnson trending today?
item.description: Former NFL star Chris Johnson is trending after revealing on Good Morning America that he was diagnosed with ALS last year.

item.title: How does Ja Morant trade impacts Jaylen Brown's potential Portland move? NBA insider weighs in
item.description: Ja Morant's arrival gives Portland a crowded backcourt, raising questions about minutes, roles and overall roster balance.

item.title: FIFA World Cup betting: What happens if games go into extra time or penalties? Rules explained
item.description: FIFA World Cup betting rules vary by market: regulation bets end after 90 minutes, while team-to-advance and some other wagers include extra time and penalties.

item.title: Ja Morant trade: NBA insider explains Grizzlies' desperation behind Trail Blazers move, draws Trae Young comparison
item.description: Ja Morant is reportedly headed to Portland, with Memphis acquiring Jerami Grant and Kris Murray in a blockbuster trade, per ESPN's Shams Charania.

item.title: Coco Gauff explains viral Bad Bunny moment after Wimbledon win, reveals how she became the singer's 'background dancer'
item.description: Coco Gauff shared an Instagram Story showing Bad Bunny performing on stage, with the tennis star appearing among the dancers behind him.

item.title: Gabriel Martinelli saves Brazil from World Cup humiliation with last-gasp knockout winner against Japan
item.description: Brazil will face the winner of Norway versus Ivory Coast in Round of 16 in New Jersey

item.title: Who will replace Jack Draper at Wimbledon? Injury forces British star out of tournament
item.description: Jack Draper’s was earlier forced out of the French Open and his injury trouble continues in Wimbledon, though he appeared to regain form.

item.title: Sindarov to play the fourth season of GCL
item.description: Uzbek GM Javokhir Sindarov prepares for a World Championship match in November while competing in multiple tournaments, including the Global Chess League.

item.title: Stretched Jannik Sinner overcomes Miomir Kecmanovic to begin Wimbledon title defence
item.description: It was far from comfortable as Jannik Sinner lost the opening set to spark concerns among fans recalling his second-round shock at Roland Garros

item.title: Brazil vs Japan Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Last-gasp winner sends Selecao into Round of 16
item.description: Brazil vs Japan Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Brazil beat Japan 2-1 to seal their place in Round of 16

item.title: French Open finalist Maja Chwalinska tumbles out of Wimbledon after fall on match point
item.description: Just weeks after her fairytale run as a qualifier at Roland Garros, Chwalinska was unable to recapture her clay-court magic on the grass of the All England Club

item.title: Malik Beasley indicted along with fellow ex-NBA player Ed Davis: All we know about illegal sports gambling
item.description: Malik Beasley, Ed Davis, and four others were indicted for their involvement in a sports betting operation.

item.title: Jannik Sinner suffers scary fall at Wimbledon as umpire rushes from chair to check on World No. 1
item.description: Wimbledon 2026: The incident occurred with the score locked at 2-2 in the fifth game of the third set

item.title: F1: Ferrari, McLaren throw the gauntlet down to Mercedes
item.description: The upgrade packages have helped teams close the gap on the leaders, meaning we are in for a thrilling season

item.title: Anand not to run for Fide deputy president as Dvorkovich announces re-election bid
item.description: Arkady Dvorkovich will seek to return to the global chess body’s highest office with Timur Turlov as deputy president

item.title: Commercial venues exploit sports broadcasts without paying rights holders, says Koan Advisory Report
item.description: According to the report, the issue stems from TRAI's current definition of a commercial subscriber

item.title: Lionel Messi denied top billing in FIFA's World Cup rankings despite record-breaking group-stage show
item.description: Lionel Messi scored six goals in the group stage at the 2026 FIFA World Cup

item.title: Chris Johnson health scare: Former NFL star gives update about ‘shocking’ diagnosis
item.description: Chris Johnson, ex-running back for Titans and Cardinals, shares ALS diagnosis in Good Morning America interview.

item.title: Enzo Maresca replaces Pep Guardiola as new Manchester City manager
item.description: Manchester City on Monday unveiled Italian Enzo Maresca as their new manager, taking over from Pep Guardiola.

item.title: What is Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis combined net worth? All on her fiancé, wealth and huge engagement ring
item.description: At Wimbledon, Aryna Sabalenka backs ongoing player protests for lower-ranked competitors. Despite record prize money, player demands remain unmet.

item.title: Carlo Ancelotti shuts down Japan's ‘mind games’, reveals Neymar's role in Brazil's World Cup knockout
item.description: Brazil will face Japan in one of the most anticipated knockout fixtures of the tournament.

item.title: Why is Carlos Alcaraz not playing at Wimbledon 2026? Injury update, recovery status and return timeline
item.description: Wimbledon 2026 will be quieter without two-time champion Carlos Alcaraz, who is absent due to a wrist injury.

item.title: Who is Michael Zheng? All about the Wimbledon debutant's family, background and tennis career
item.description: Michael Zheng's ATP rise is rooted in his family's journey from China to the U.S., where they pursued new opportunities and a better future.

item.title: Barcelona test waters for Harry Kane transfer, but Bayern Munich star keeps Camp Nou door shut for now: Report
item.description: Barcelona has contacted Harry Kane's camp about a potential transfer from Bayern Munich after the World Cup.

item.title: Cabo Verde hit by off-field controversy as captain faces rape allegation ahead of Argentina tie
item.description: Cabo Verde captain Ryan Mendes is under investigation by New Zealand police for allegedly raping a Brazilian translator during the FIFA Series tournament.

item.title: Brazil's flair meets Japan's fearlessness: Who will win Round of 32 clash?
item.description: In the Round of 32, Brazil, led by Vinicius Jr., takes on Japan, known for their strong teamwork.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: From Messi, Ronaldo to Neymar and Salah, here are the bodyguards guarding football's biggest stars
item.description: From former UFC fighter to a US Navy SEAL, ,meet some of the ace bodyguards, guarding ultimate icons at the ongoing FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Vinicius is flying, Neymar is back, but Brazil's biggest problems before Japan clash are still hiding in plain sight
item.description: Brazil topped Group C and enters the knockout stage with momentum. However, they face tactical challenges against Japan, who previously defeated them.

item.title: Emma Raducanu withdraws with leg injury on eve of Wimbledon
item.description: The 23-year-old former US Open champion posted a message on Instagram announcing her decision.

item.title: James Pearce Jr. arrest: Bodycam video captures Falcons star's confrontation with police after Rickea Jackson incident
item.description: James Pearce Jr. was initially charged with aggravated battery, stalking, fleeing police and assaulting an officer after his arrest.

item.title: Canada earn first knockout win on stoppage-time goal vs South Africa; Stephen Eustaquio the hero
item.description: Stephen Eustaquio scored in the second minute of second-half stoppage to give Canada a 1-0 victory over South Africa in a round of 32 World Cup match.

item.title: Co-hosts Canada stay in the World Cup party, beat SA to enter last 16
item.description: Stephen Eustaquio’s stunning volley in added time settled the Rd of 32 tie against a defensive South Africa in Los Angeles

item.title: South Korean president goes nuclear after FIFA World Cup flop show, demands investigation: ‘Favoritism and cronyism'
item.description: Hong Myung-bo's re-appointment as national team manager in 2024 had already led to backlash, with many accusing the South Korean FA of favouritism.

item.title: Who was Yimvert Berroteran? Rising Venezuelan football star, 18, dies after earthquake strikes youth tournament
item.description: Venezuelan youth footballer Yimvert Berroterán died after a wall collapsed during an earthquake in Colombia

item.title: What happened to Tyler Reddick at today's NASCAR cup race at Somona? Details of steering issues
item.description: Tyler Reddick overcame an early steering failure at NASCAR's Sonoma race after losing multiple laps in the pits, fighting back despite the setback.

item.title: Will NFL ban Brandon Aiyuk after 49ers controversy? Insider raises concerns over WR's future in the league
item.description: Teams could be wary of pursuing Brandon Aiyuk after his public disputes with the 49ers, fearing similar issues may surface elsewhere.

item.title: Is Lucas Trejo playing in the World Cup? Argentine footballer's status after Venezuela earthquake tragedy
item.description: Lucas Trejo lost his wife and two children when their apartment building collapsed in Playa Grande during Venezuela’s deadly earthquakes.

item.title: Robert Lewandowski MLS salary: Chicago Fire move could make him league's second-highest earner behind Lionel Messi
item.description: Despite interest from AC Milan and several Saudi clubs, Robert Lewandowski chose Chicago Fire and is set to continue his career in MLS.

item.title: Miles Bridges trade: NBA insider raises fresh doubts over Jalen Green’s ‘long term’ future in Phoenix
item.description: Brett Siegel believes the Suns’ Miles Bridges trade could signal bigger plans ahead, creating uncertainty about Jalen Green’s future.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake: Argentine footballer Lucas Trejo’s first response emerges after family tragedy
item.description: Argentine footballer Lucas Trejo shared a family photo on Instagram after losing his wife and two children in Venezuela’s devastating earthquake.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Focus on big stars, rise of Africa in knockouts
item.description: Messi, Mbappe and Haaland light up Golden Boot race as nine out of 10 African nations qualify for the round of 32

item.title: Rohit aces javelin, Sreeshankar long jump as Inter-State athletics ends
item.description: Rohit Yadav won javelin gold with an 87.05m throw, while Murali Sreeshankar leapt 8.38m in long jump at the National Championships in Bhubaneswar.

item.title: What are the allegations against Ryan Mendes? Cape Verde captain faces probe during FIFA World Cup
item.description: Cape Verde captain Ryan Mendes is under police investigation following allegations from a translator, while FIFA remains in contact with authorities.

item.title: Sinner, Djokovic chase a Wimbledon high
item.description: The Italian world No.1 and the Serbian 24-time Slam winner have a point to prove after their early French Open exit

item.title: Possession not always having the last say at the World Cup
item.description: With defensive structures more organised, dominance is being increasingly measured by intrusion rather than possession

item.title: Novak Djokovic reveals India plan, hopes to finally meet Virat Kohli after years of texting
item.description: It was in January 2024 that Novak Djokovic first spoke publicly about his relationship with Virat Kohli during the Australian Open.

item.title: Lionel Messi, Argentina warned as Scaloni refuses to write off Cape Verde: ‘Neither Spain nor Uruguay could beat them’
item.description: Argentina face Cape Verde in the Round of 32. Cape Verde drew to Spain, Uruguay and Saudi Arabia to finish second in their group.

item.title: Records broken, giants fall, underdogs rise: FIFA World Cup 2026 enters knockout madness
item.description: Lionel Messi, Erling Haaland, Kylian Mbappe and Cristiano Ronaldo have all gotten on the scoring sheet in the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Portugal coach clears air on why Cristiano Ronaldo wasn't rested for Colombia clash: ‘It’s childish'
item.description: FIFA World Cup 2026: Cristiano Ronaldo failed to score against Colombia as the game ended in a goalless draw.
